project.name: 初中知识体系专项练习库
project.designRead: 教育平台 / 初中生 / 清新活力 / 中密度 / 避免冷硬企业感

styleContinuityAnchors.colorTone: warm-bright, primary blue #3B82F6, per-subject accent colors
styleContinuityAnchors.cardStyle: white bg, rounded-xl, soft shadow-md, hover:shadow-lg lift
styleContinuityAnchors.typography: Inter system sans, bold headings, medium body, 16-18px base
styleContinuityAnchors.borderRadius: xl (1rem) for cards, lg (1rem) for buttons, md (0.75rem) for inputs
styleContinuityAnchors.iconStyle: emoji-based for subjects, clean SVG for UI
